raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California's travel and hospitality industry received $95 million in one-time stimulus funding to support tourism marketing.",
    "The $95 million in stimulus funding is expected to hasten the recovery of California's tourism economy after the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "California's tourism industry has provided over $1 billion to promote the California brand globally in the past 15 years.",
    "The stimulus funding in the state budget will allow marketing campaigns to continue in California and the United States for the next year.",
    "California's tourism industry is recognized as one of the state's most reliable job producers."
  ]
}
```
